extension_description.message: Browser extension to (fuzzy) search and navigate bookmarks, history and open tabs.

edit_manage_title.message: Open this bookmark in the Bookmark Manager

options_description.message: Edit only the settings you want to override. Unchecked settings use the extension defaults and stay out of the saved YAML.

option_searchStrategy_desc.message: Choose how searches behave: `precise` favors exact matches and fastest responses, while `fuzzy` tolerates typos and similar words but runs a bit slower.

option_searchMaxResults_desc.message: Maximum number of results shown for a normal search. Tag, folder, and tab lists always show everything relevant.

option_searchFuzzyness_desc.message: How tolerant fuzzy search should be. 0 behaves like precise search; values closer to 1 allow more relaxed matches.

option_openInCurrentTab_desc.message: Open results in the current tab by default. When enabled, hold Shift or Alt to open in a new tab instead, inverting the usual behavior.

option_bookmarkColor_desc.message: Hex color applied to bookmark results in the list.

option_tabColor_desc.message: Hex color applied to entries representing currently open tabs.

option_historyColor_desc.message: Hex color applied to browsing history results.

option_searchColor_desc.message: Hex color used for the built-in web search suggestions that follow the query.

option_customSearchColor_desc.message: Hex color used for custom search engine results triggered via aliases.

option_directColor_desc.message: Hex color applied to direct navigation suggestions (for example when typing a URL).

option_enableTabs_desc.message: Include your currently open browser tabs in the search results. Disable if you only want saved items.

option_enableBookmarks_desc.message: Include bookmarks in the index so they can be searched.

option_enableHistory_desc.message: Include browsing history in the index. Large history ranges can slow down startup on older machines.

option_enableSearchEngines_desc.message: Show quick links to web search engines that use the current query.

option_enableDirectUrl_desc.message: Detect URL-shaped search terms and offer a direct navigation result at the top.

option_quickBookmarkCurrentTab_desc.message: Folder name or folder ID used by the first default result that opens the rich bookmark editor for saving the active tab. Folder IDs are more reliable across localized browsers than English folder names like the default. Set to false, an empty string, or only whitespace to disable.

option_displayTags_desc.message: Show hashtag-style tags extracted from bookmark titles as clickable badges.

option_displayFolderName_desc.message: Show each bookmark's folder trail as clickable breadcrumbs.

option_displayTabGroup_desc.message: Show tab group names as clickable badges for open tabs.

option_displaySearchMatchHighlight_desc.message: Highlight matching text in titles and URLs. Turn off to reduce rendering work on slower devices.

option_displayLastVisit_desc.message: Show how long ago each result was last visited when that information is available.

option_displayVisitCounter_desc.message: Show how many times an item has been visited according to your browsing history.

option_displayDateAdded_desc.message: Show the date a bookmark was created (YYYY-MM-DD) when that information exists.

option_displayScore_desc.message: Show the numeric relevance score next to each result, which can be useful when tuning ranking options.

option_displayFavicons_desc.message: Show real website favicons. Requires the 'favicon' permission.

option_bookmarksIgnoreFolderList_desc.message: Array of bookmark folder paths whose contents should never be indexed. All subfolders of the listed folders are skipped as well.

option_tabsOnlyCurrentWindow_desc.message: Limit tab indexing to the active browser window. Helps multi-window users keep the result set focused.

option_maxRecentTabsToShow_desc.message: Number of most recently used tabs to show when the popup opens without a search term. Set to 0 to disable the MRU list entirely.

option_historyDaysAgo_desc.message: How many days back in time the extension should request items from the browsing history.

option_historyMaxItems_desc.message: Upper bound on the number of history items retrieved. Larger values increase initialization time and memory usage.

option_historyIgnoreList_desc.message: List of string fragments. History entries whose URL contains any of these fragments will be excluded from indexing.

option_searchEngineChoices_desc.message: Ordered list of built-in search engines that appear as fallback actions. `$s` within the `urlPrefix` is replaced with the search term; otherwise the term is appended.

option_customSearchEngines_desc.message: Custom search engine definitions that can be triggered with aliases (e.g. `g query`). `$s` inside `urlPrefix` is replaced with the search term. `blank` is optional and used when the alias is entered without a query.

option_scoreBookmarkBase_desc.message: Base score applied to bookmark results before any multipliers or bonuses are added.

option_scoreTabBase_desc.message: Base score applied to open tab results before additional weighting.

option_scoreHistoryBase_desc.message: Base score applied to history results before additional weighting.

option_scoreSearchEngineBase_desc.message: Base score applied to built-in search engine choices to keep them sorted after organic results.

option_scoreCustomSearchEngineBase_desc.message: Base score applied to custom search engine choices so they float to the top when their alias matches.

option_scoreDirectUrlScore_desc.message: Base score awarded when the user types a direct URL, ensuring it always ranks first.

option_scoreTagWeight_desc.message: Weight multiplier applied when a search term matches one of the parsed tags.

option_scoreUrlWeight_desc.message: Weight multiplier applied when a search term matches the URL of an item.

option_scoreGroupWeight_desc.message: Weight multiplier applied when a search term matches the tab group name.

option_scoreFolderWeight_desc.message: Weight multiplier applied when a search term matches the folder name of a bookmark.

option_scoreCustomBonusScore_desc.message: Allow bookmark titles to include manual bonus scores in the form ` +<score>` which are added to the calculated result score.

option_scoreExactIncludesBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded for each search term that appears as an exact substring within the title or URL.

option_scoreExactStartsWithBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when the title or URL starts with the full search term.

option_scoreExactEqualsBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when the title exactly equals the search term.

option_scoreExactTagMatchBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when a tag matches the search term exactly.

option_scoreExactFolderMatchBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when a folder name matches the search term exactly.

option_scoreExactGroupMatchBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when a tab group name matches the search term exactly.

option_scoreExactPhraseTitleBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded for an exact phrase match within the title.

option_scoreExactPhraseUrlBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded for an exact phrase match within the URL.

option_scoreVisitedBonusScore_desc.message: Multiplier applied per visit count when calculating the history-based bonus score.

option_scoreVisitedBonusScoreMaximum_des.message: Upper limit applied to the visit-based bonus so frequently visited items cannot exceed this value.

option_scoreRecentBonusScoreMaximum_desc.message: Maximum bonus that can be awarded based on how recently an item was visited. Fresh visits score higher than those near the `historyDaysAgo` cutoff.

option_scoreBookmarkOpenTabBonus_desc.message: Bonus score awarded when a bookmark is also open as an active browser tab.

option_uFuzzyOptions_desc.message: Advanced configuration passed straight to the uFuzzy search library. Leave empty to rely on the built-in tuning. See https://github.com/leeoniya/uFuzzy?tab=readme-ov-file#options.

btn_undo_title.message: Undo the latest bookmark manager change

selection_summary.message: Click a bookmark or check bookmarks.

btn_save_bookmark_title.message: Save the current bookmark title, URL, and existing tags

desc_suggested_tags.message: Uses your browser's local LLM to suggest tags for the current bookmark or checked bookmarks.

btn_suggest_tags_title.message: Suggest tags for checked bookmarks, or the current bookmark if none are checked

btn_add_title.message: Add these tags to checked bookmarks, or the current bookmark if none are checked

btn_replace_title.message: Replace all tags on checked bookmarks, or the current bookmark if none are checked

btn_remove_title.message: Remove these tags from checked bookmarks, or the current bookmark if none are checked

desc_bookmark_safety.message: Export a backup before changing many bookmarks. Undo only keeps the latest 50 changes and is cleared when this page closes.

desc_bookmark_safety_dup.message: Export a backup before deleting bookmarks. Undo only keeps the latest 50 changes and is cleared when this page closes.

desc_bookmark_safety_cleanup.message: Export a backup before applying cleanup changes. Undo only keeps the latest 50 changes and is cleared when this page closes.

btn_move_title.message: Move checked bookmarks, or the current bookmark if none are checked

desc_undo_history.message: Undo snapshots store the previous bookmark title, URL, parent folder, and position for each affected bookmark. They stay in memory only until this page closes or reloads.

desc_ai_cleanup.message: Generate a prompt for external AI prompting or ask the browser's local LLM for a JSON proposal. Review every proposed change before applying it.

placeholder_proposal_json.message: Paste the LLM JSON response here

options_description_bookmarks.message: Click a bookmark to edit its title and URL. Check one or more bookmarks to apply tag and move actions to that selection.

empty_duplicates.message: No duplicate bookmark URLs were found.

empty_undo_history.message: No bookmark manager changes to undo yet.

title_no_undo_available.message: No bookmark manager changes are available to undo

proposal_empty_state.message: Generate or paste a proposal to review changes here.

desc_duplicates_summary_2.message: groups. Ranking prefers more tags, cleaner titles, newer additions, then deeper folder placement.

desc_duplicates_summary_3.message: lower-ranked copies can be selected for deletion.

notice_deletion_unavailable.message: Bookmark deletion is unavailable in this preview context.

notice_tag_updates_unavailable.message: Tag updates are unavailable in this preview context.
